title: Skeleton Creeper
body:
A new mob, Skeleton Creeper, has been added. It has faster movement speed, lower health, and lower spawn probability than normal Creeper.

It was made by Mcreator. Textures and inspirations are from the mod "The Graveyard". 

This mod is just an exercise and a share for me. I won't profit from it, so there will be no donation channels and licenses, and because the SSD and the workspace are damaged, the mod will not be updated.
